news.t: The Implied Analyst 12-Month Target For The iShares S&P 100 ETF

holdings.infoBox: OEF is an equity ETF with a total of 105 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 10.96%, Apple at 9.24%, Microsoft at 6.30%, Amazon.com at 5.10%, and Alphabet at 4.60%.

overview.description: The iShares S&P 100 ETF (OEF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 100 index, a market-cap-weighted index of 100 US large-cap companies selected by the S&P Committee. OEF was launched on Oct 23, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Mega-cap tech, energy, airline ETFs see inflows — what to watch now
data.text: "Shark Tank" investor Kevin O'Leary, the chairman of O'Shares ETFs, and Matthew Bartolini, head of SPDR Americas Research at State Street Global Advisors, talk recent exchange-traded fund inflows with...

data.title: The Implied Analyst 12-Month Target For The iShares S&P 100 ETF
data.text: For the iShares S&P 100 ETF, we found that the implied analyst target price for the ETF based upon its underlying holdings is $146.59 per unit.
